title: rhododendron irroratum subsp. kontumense
intro: Rhododendron irroratum subsp. kontumense is a subspecies of Rhododendron irroratum, a flowering plant native to Vietnam. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating wounds. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Rhododendron irroratum subsp. kontumense can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
